name: Wasatch Side Table with Drawer Light Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee Assembly Required
description:
Make a practical addition to your home with the Wasatch Side Table with Drawer from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This natural-shade side table is carved out of wood in a round shape with X-shaped leg base for a standout look. Designed with a built-in drawer, this wooden side table helps provide ample space for a lamp, books and other items.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
